strategistNote.title: Mag7 delivered. QQQ near TP1. PINS cleared stop. Gold survived Apr 30 scare.
strategistNote.body: Saturday May 2 update. Fed held rates Apr 29 as expected. Mag7 earnings (GOOG/AMZN/META) beat — QQQ surged to $674 vs $607.95 avg (+10.8%), approaching TP1 at $729. PINS recovered to $20.22, back above $20 stop — RSU hedge thesis intact. BTC climbing from $75.6K low to $78.4K, SL at $70K has ~10% cushion. Gold had a dangerous dip to $4,515 on Apr 30 (only $115 above SL $4,400) before recovering to $4,644 — watch Iran/oil volatility. Hormuz still blocked, ceasefire fragile. ⚠️ Wio AED deadline is May 3 — act today if not deploying the 115K AED.

positions.label: VTI (Total Market ETF)
positions.notes: DCA core. 20.47 sh @ $325.00. SL -8% / TP1 +15% / TP2 +25%. Monthly DCA — TPs reduce, never exit.

positions.label: QQQ (Nasdaq 100 ETF)
positions.notes: Tech recovery play. 2.27 sh @ $607.95. SL -8% / TP1 +20% / TP2 +30%. Reassess if tech leadership breaks.

positions.label: Gold (Non-Expiry CFD)
positions.notes: 0.26 oz @ $4,612 avg. Now $4,644 (+0.7%). ⚠️ Dipped to $4,515 on Apr 30 — only $115 above SL $4,400. Recovered but watch Iran/oil. TP1 $5,200 / TP2 $5,800. NOTE: separate $393 loss on 20x CFD leg Apr 9-12 — never again.

positions.label: Pinterest (eToro)
positions.notes: Recovered above $20 stop — now $20.22. 42.52 sh @ $24.44 avg = $1,039 cost. Still -17.3% below avg cost. SEPARATE: 1,429 RSU shares at employer broker (not eToro). SL $20 / TP1 $32 / TP2 $40. Monitor for continuation.

positions.label: Bitcoin
positions.notes: 0.0466 BTC @ $87.1K avg. Recovering — now $78.4K (-9.9% from avg). Touched $74.9K low Apr 28, SL at $70K has ~10% cushion. TP1 $110K / TP2 $130K. Hold unless macro worsens.

positions.label: iShares Global Clean Energy ETF
positions.notes: 57.76 sh @ $16.62. +20.2% unrealized. SL $15 / TP1 $22 (+32%) / TP2 $25 (+50%). Trim into strength.

uptrendAdd.note: Breakout confirmed above $20.50 with volume — add on momentum

dipLight.note: Breakout retest — prior resistance now support

dipConviction.note: Near avg cost, major base support — back up the truck

positions.label: Taiwan Semiconductor ADR
positions.notes: 2.10 sh @ $295.14. +36.3% all-time winner, +5.2% today. SL $265 / TP1 $380 (+29%) / TP2 $420 (+42%). Watch Taiwan-China geopolitics.

uptrendAdd.note: Fresh breakout above $415 — add on momentum continuation

dipLight.note: Breakout retest — prior resistance flipped support

dipConviction.note: Strong structural support, still +15% above avg cost

positions.label: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
positions.notes: NEW: 3.02 sh @ $99.28. Gold miners play alongside GC=F direct gold position. Currently -5%. SL ~$88 (-11%) / TP1 $115 (+16%) / TP2 $130 (+31%). Gold miners lagging bullion — watch for catch-up.

copyPortfolio.note: 7 holdings. Current value $1,993.56 (+$61.68 / +3.2%). Dividend-confirmed: LRCX, Saab AB, Wheaton Precious Metals, GE Vernova, Micron, Royal Gold, Nutrien. Individual cost basis unconfirmed.

warStatus.status: CEASEFIRE EXTENDED — FRAGILE / HORMUZ STILL BLOCKED
warStatus.description: Original 2-week ceasefire (Apr 7) expired. Trump extended it ~Apr 21 but only briefly. US counter-blockade of Hormuz launched Apr 13. Iran seized ships Apr 22. Peace talks stalling as of Apr 29+. Oil prices rising again on renewed risk premium. XLE thesis remains dead but war risk is creeping back.

triggers.label: Ceasefire extended post-expiry
triggers.detail: Trump extended ~Apr 21, but fragile — US counter-blockade active

triggers.label: Hormuz fully reopened
triggers.detail: Strait still blocked as of May 2. Iran/US talks stalled.

actionItems.label: ⚠️ Wio AED deadline TODAY (May 3) — move 115K AED to Wio Fixed Saving Space (4% p.a.) if not deploying. Act now.
Gold $4,644 — survived Apr 30 scare ($4,515, 115 above SL). Still vulnerable to Iran/oil swings. Monitor daily.
QQQ $674 — now +10.8% above avg cost $607.95. TP1 at $729 is 8% away. Consider partial trim if macro softens.
PINS $20.22 — cleared $20 stop, now hold. RSU hedge thesis intact. Still -17% below avg $24.44.
BTC $78,445 — recovering from $74.9K low. SL $70K has ~10% cushion. Hold.
GDX — watch gold price action for miners catch-up confirmation.
Redefine 115K AED deployment triggers — Hormuz still blocked, ceasefire fragile

events.label: Fed Rate Decision — held as expected (passed)
Mag7 Earnings: GOOG, AMZN, META — beat, QQQ +10.8% (passed)

geopolitical.notes: Original ceasefire expired ~Apr 21, Trump extended briefly. US counter-blockade of Hormuz active since Apr 13. Iran seized ships Apr 22. Peace talks stalling. Oil prices rising on renewed risk premium. Monitor daily.

etoro.notes: Apr 1-25 period P&L: -$786.99. Sunday Apr 27 snapshot: portfolio $39,431.21, unrealized P&L +$1,856.65. Smart portfolios (BigTech +14%, RenewableEnergy +17%) doing heavy lifting.

bullRunWatchlist.label: Broadcom
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: JPMorgan #1 AI infrastructure pick. Custom silicon for hyperscalers (Google, Meta, Apple). $571B AI capex flows through AVGO. Golden cross confirmed. Revenues up 50%+ YoY.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Q2 earnings — AI networking pipeline, custom chip TAM expansion
bullRunWatchlist.source: JPMorgan top pick Apr 2026, Goldman Sachs AI infrastructure thesis
bullRunWatchlist.traderSignal: Cathie Wood ARK adding AI infrastructure; Buffett defensively in cash — contrarian signal for high-growth names

bullRunWatchlist.label: Freeport-McMoRan
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: Copper supercycle in full swing. AI data centers need 475kmt/yr copper by 2026 (JPMorgan). 330kmt structural deficit forecast. Grasberg ramp + global EV buildout. Stock +40% YoY, still in early supercycle innings.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Q2 earnings, China infrastructure stimulus, AI data center capex announcements
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs copper supercycle thesis, JPMorgan 330kmt deficit forecast, 24/7 Wall St institutional accumulation report

bullRunWatchlist.label: Nvidia
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: Undisputed AI GPU monopoly. $571B AI capex all flows through NVDA at some point. Bullish wedge breakout confirmed post-correction. Blackwell cycle still in early innings. Slight overbought — buy dips only.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: GTC conference follow-through, Blackwell H200/B200 shipment data, hyperscaler capex guidance
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs 2026 AI infrastructure thesis, Zacks/Nasdaq top AI buy 2026

bullRunWatchlist.label: Vertiv Holdings
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: The picks-and-shovels AI play nobody talks about. Powers and cools every AI data center. Margins expanding. Goldman Sachs and Zacks both flagged as top 2026 buy alongside NVDA/AVGO. Massively underpriced vs AI chip stocks.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Q2 earnings, data center buildout contracts, power infrastructure policy support
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs 2026 top picks, Zacks top AI infrastructure 2026

bullRunWatchlist.label: iShares Silver Trust
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: Goldman target $85-100/oz for 2026. Silver underperformed gold YTD — massive catch-up trade. Green transition metal (solar panels, EVs). Dual demand: monetary store of value + industrial. Higher beta gold play.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Gold breakout above $5,000, Fed rate cuts, green energy spending acceleration
bullRunWatchlist.source: Goldman Sachs $85-100/oz silver forecast 2026, Finance Magnates analyst $375 silver prediction

bullRunWatchlist.label: Southern Copper Corp
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: World's lowest-cost copper producer. Peru + Mexico mines = lowest AISC globally. Trades near all-time highs but copper supercycle justifies premium. Higher quality play vs FCX with better dividend yield.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Copper futures breakout above $6/lb, China demand data, AI capex announcements
bullRunWatchlist.source: AInvest copper bull cycle analysis, Goldman Sachs copper demand forecast

bullRunWatchlist.label: Ethereum
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: 56% gap to cycle high of $4,953. Pectra upgrade live — improves staking and validator efficiency. Institutional ETF inflows accelerating. Base layer of DeFi, NFT, Layer 2 ecosystem. Underperformed BTC this cycle — mean reversion due.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Pectra upgrade adoption, ETF inflow acceleration, BTC breakout above $90K (ETH follows)
bullRunWatchlist.source: BeInCrypto Pectra analysis, CoinDCX bull run signals 2026, ETF institutional data

bullRunWatchlist.label: Marvell Technology
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: JPMorgan top pick for custom silicon + AI networking. Building custom AI ASICs for Amazon and Google. Near-term overbought (RSI 70+). Don't chase — wait for 10-15% pullback then buy aggressively.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Q2 earnings, custom ASIC design win announcements, hyperscaler spending updates
bullRunWatchlist.source: JPMorgan top picks April 2026, MarketBeat semiconductor top picks 2026

bullRunWatchlist.label: Solana
bullRunWatchlist.thesis: 48.8% institutional ownership of spot SOL ETF — highest of any crypto product. Fastest-growing Layer 1. $600M+ weekly DEX volume. 'Third Pillar' narrative after BTC + ETH. High risk, high reward.
bullRunWatchlist.catalyst: Spot ETF approval momentum, DeFi TVL growth, BTC-led crypto bull run
bullRunWatchlist.source: CoinDCX institutional ownership data, MEXC bull run analysis 2026
